_comment: Embodied AI / robot foundation models domain pack
display_name: Embodied AI and Robot Foundation Models

query_rewrite.core_clause: ((all:embodied OR all:robot OR all:robotic) AND (all:"vision-language-action" OR all:vla OR all:policy OR all:"foundation model" OR all:"world model" OR all:manipulation OR all:navigation))
